description: A data corruption error has caused three South American capital cities (Caracas, Bogota, and Quito) to default to coordinates (0,0) in the 'world_capitals' layer of the 'world_survey.gpkg' project. Restore these features to their correct locations using the 'Original Coords' found in their respective description fields. Ensure the features 'Caracas', 'Bogota', and 'Quito' are positioned within 0.5 degrees of their intended coordinates.
